done_criteria: Source story or brief path identified, normally under docs/stories/ or docs/brief.md
Target client, server, shared, db, and docs files are listed concretely when applicable
Smallest useful validation command set is chosen from make build, make test, and persistence-related commands when needed
Blocking ambiguities are called out with explicit fallback to user_story_authoring when definition is not good enough
Code or docs changes are applied only in the planned areas
Existing Gleam, Lustre, shared, SQL, and UI patterns are reused where possible
Relevant contracts, i18n, authz, migrations, Squirrel regeneration, or db impacts are updated or explicitly declared untouched
Scope stays aligned with the source story and does not silently expand
Test result recorded or environment blocker explained clearly
If persistence or SQL changed, dbmate-backed checks and Squirrel impact are covered or the blocker is stated
Acceptance criteria coverage and residual regression risks are summarized honestly
Files changed are summarized by area
Validation summary is concise and honest
Story or docs status updates are recorded only when they were actually made
Follow-up debt, blockers, or residual risks are listed, or explicitly stated as none
